growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.medium: Sodium carbonate / NaCl soda mineral medium with thiosulfate

up.method: electron donor; specific rate not tabulated

growth_records.cite: Dimitry Y. Sorokin et al. The Microbial Sulfur Cycle at Extremely Haloalkaline Conditions of Soda Lakes. Frontiers in Microbiology (2011). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2011.00044. [PMC3128939]
growth_records.snippet: Maximal specific growth rate 0.22 h-1 ... Maximal growth yield with S2O3^2- 3.5 mg protein mmol-1 (Table 2).
growth_records.notes: Review-compiled Table 2 value. mu_max 0.22 h-1; doubling_time=ln2/0.22=3.15 h (calculated). Yield 3.5 mg protein/mmol thiosulfate. pH optimum 8.5 (facultative alkaliphile). Upper salt limit 3.5 M Na+. Temperature not stated. From Banciu et al. 2008.
